title: Crit Quiver Craft (Visceral Quiver)
goal: 6-mod crit-flavored quiver with T1 flat damage, bow damage or projectile speed prefixes, and crit-friendly suffixes (crit dmg, crit chance, +2 level, attack speed). Cheaper than crafting a full bow.

baseRequirements.hint: Pickup white quivers or buy them off trade. ilvl 75 is enough for the relevant mod tiers.

steps.title: Perfect Transmute + Perfect Aug → magic 2-mod
steps.description:
On a white Visceral Quiver, apply Perfect Orb of Transmutation followed by Perfect Orb of Augmentation. You're looking for a 2-mod magic with either:

• T1 flat damage prefix, OR
• T2 bow damage / projectile speed prefix

Plus a good suffix (crit damage bonus, crit chance, +2 level, or attack speed). If you don't hit both — alt and re-augment.
steps.stopLoss: If you're spending more than 30 quivers chasing this 2-mod combo, stop and look for fractured bases instead.

steps.title: Perfect Regal + Omen of Homogenising Coronation
steps.description:
Stack Omen of Homogenising Coronation with a Perfect Regal Orb. You want the regal to hit a PREFIX (flat damage / bow damage / projectile speed).

If the regal hits a suffix instead, you're forced to Greater Exalt the prefix slot and decide whether the craft is still worth finishing — only continue if the prefix lands at T3 or better flat damage, projectile speed or bow damage.

branches.condition: Regal hit a suffix instead of prefix
branches.message: Greater Exalt the prefix and check the roll. Only continue if T3+ flat damage / projectile speed / bow damage. Otherwise restart.

steps.title: Bone slam: Sinistral Necromancy + Preserved Jawbone + Abyssal Echoes
steps.description:
Stack:
• Omen of Sinistral Necromancy (forces PREFIX)
• Preserved Jawbone
• Abyssal Echoes (reroll unveil choices)

Unveil priority: high flat damage > bow damage > projectile speed.

If you fail to hit anything good, try annulling. Don't burn Omen of Light on this slot — it bricks more often than it saves.
steps.stopLoss: This step is the brick-risk step. If unveil offerings are all garbage, annul and retry — Omen of Light is not worth it here.

steps.title: Finish with double-omen Greater Exalt (or Perfect Exalt if all T1)
steps.description:
Use Omen of Homogenising Exaltation + Omen of Greater Exaltation + Greater Exalted Orb.

If the quiver is already all T1 mods, swap the Greater Exalted Orb for a Perfect Exalted Orb instead — better odds at landing the final T1 prefix.

The quiver is now 6-mod and ready to list.

pricingTips: List by exact rolls — quiver buyers filter aggressively by individual mods.
Include a 'bow damage' and 'projectile speed' line in the description if both are present; some buyers don't filter the rare prefixes.
notes: Visceral is the cheapest viable base — heavier quivers are not worth the price hike for this strategy.
Step 3 is the brick step. Set a cost ceiling for yourself before starting and walk away if you blow past it.
